items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: I don't need a translation for this! I know what it means! It's content and saying thank you to us.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: Uh-oh! The module is starting to throw errors. Seems like compatibility is still an issue. Anyway, let's uninstall it for now. I'm pretty surprised that it ran smoothly for this long.
Xuanyin uninstalls the Cat Language Translation Module from your Pangu Terminal and transmits the related data back to her.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: The logic of my module is still straightforward. My understanding of Terminal Technology is no match for those officially trained researchers.

options.text: It doesn't interfere with my understanding.
Now you know how to improve it.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: Thank you. It took me a great effort to develop a module like this.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: You're right. The most important thing for a scientist is trial and error. Great success is built on failure!

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: Thank you for helping me gather this data. I'll analyze it thoroughly and try to find a way to improve the module.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: Let's do it again sometime. I'll speed up the development of translation modules for other animals, and they'll surely blow you away, hehe!
